strengths: 6+ years of full-stack experience with the exact required stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB across Optilyz, RIDE Capital, and re:cinq
Direct AI agent development experience at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — a specifically required skill
Strong software craftsmanship foundation: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus authored testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial) and runs testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the resume, though Node.js/TypeScript backend depth is extensive
Kotlin is not mentioned; Java experience is older (Altom, robotic arms) rather than recent
Currently in a career gap since October 2025

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience

response.justification: Bogdan is a rare match for this role: he brings 6+ years of full-stack delivery on the exact primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) across fintech, martech, and data-integration domains, while also hitting the standout requirement of AI agent development through his current re:cinq work on MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks. His craftsmanship credentials — TDD, trunk-based development, authored open-source testing tools, and a track record of teaching workshops — align directly with the role's emphasis on clean code, code review, and process improvement. Combined with cloud/Docker/Kubernetes exposure via GISCollective and AWS CDK at Optilyz, plus polyglot breadth (Java, C/C++, Python-adjacent tooling), he is well positioned to contribute to internal automation tooling from day one.
